description: Early Movers extractor — scores convergence-radar tickers by acceleration / earliness signatures BEFORE pumps occur. Built in response to MRVL +29% 2026-06-02 case study where signals existed but were buried at rank #13. Also writes convergence-radar daily snapshot archive.

schedule.name: justhodl-early-movers-twice-per-hour
schedule.description: Runs every 30 minutes — pre-pump signals are time-sensitive
